Vendored third-party assets, embedded into the Traccia binary so the
dashboard has no CDN dependency:

- **uPlot** (`uPlot.iife.min.js`, `uPlot.min.css`) — MIT License, © Leon Sorokin. https://github.com/leeoniya/uPlot — see `uPlot.LICENSE.txt`.
- **htmx** (`htmx.min.js`) — BSD Zero Clause License. https://github.com/bigskysoftware/htmx — see `htmx.LICENSE.txt`.
